scripts.build: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/prepare-blog-assets.mjs && BLOG_ASSETS_PREPARED=1 DEPLOY_TARGET=node vite build
scripts.build:cloudflare: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/prepare-blog-assets.mjs && BLOG_ASSETS_PREPARED=1 DEPLOY_TARGET=cloudflare vite build
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:a11y && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:unit: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/prepare-blog-assets.mjs --include-previews && BLOG_ASSETS_PREPARED=1 vitest run src scripts
scripts.check: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/prepare-blog-assets.mjs --include-previews && BLOG_ASSETS_PREPARED=1 svelte-kit sync && BLOG_ASSETS_PREPARED=1 svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.check:watch: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/prepare-blog-assets.mjs --include-previews && BLOG_ASSETS_PREPARED=1 svelte-kit sync && BLOG_ASSETS_PREPARED=1 svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch
